name: Add New Column To User Table
summary: Add and propagate a new column on the user table across schema, migrations, and application usage.

tasks.name: Update user schema
tasks.summary: Update the user table model or schema definition to include the new column.

tasks.name: Create and verify migration
tasks.summary: Create the migration for the new column and verify it applies cleanly.

tasks.name: Update application usage
tasks.summary: Update application code paths that read or write the new column.
